review_title: A great Data Management & Reporting Tool
description: We moved from another platform to Tercept and the transition was very smooth. The team helped throughout the process and we have been using it for almost a year now. We are using it on a daily basis for all our analytical needs. The platform is very simple to use and the customer support is great. Highly recommended.
author: Pushkar R.
pros: Tercept consolidates the reporting across multiple partners and shows them on a single dashboard. It solved the dependency on our tech so that we could focus more on the real data analysis and maximize the performance. The platform has a lot of dimensions and metrics that we can play with to get the desired data and make decisions accordingly.
cons: The platform is slow sometimes. I understand this is due to a hell lot of data and I hope they keep working on it.Also, they could improve on UI and make it more appealing by using different colors.

review_title: Reliable unified reporting with good customization & support.
description: Tercept provides reliable, unified reporting with excellent customization and support. Its high data granularity allows for deep dives into complex metrics, while automation eliminates manual reporting efforts.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: They provide high granularity of the data, which allows for deep dives into complex metrics and buying patterns. Support is fast & responsive. Specifically their ability to build new data cubes or custom integrations. Tercept as one of the most affordable options in the market.
cons: Tercept's primary drawbacks are the notable lack of templates for quick setup and the fact that triggers and actions is not fully supported for automation.

review_title: Beware Cancelation Terms and Data Privacy
description: Affordable integration service but suffers from reliability issues, data privacy breaches, and poor account support.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I appreciate that Tercept offers an affordable integration and BI platform. Support from a human data analyst is helpful when their platform fails to sync data.
cons: After using Tercept with reasonable success for several years, we decided to switch to Fivetran after experiencing several concerning data privacy issues with the Tercept platform (data from another of their clients populated into our internal reports). They took responsibility for the issue, promised a fix, but then the same issue occurred again a short time later. Their support team is generally helpful, but everyone is India-based, and response times are slow during off-hours or international holidays. After providing notice that we would not be renewing our annual contract, the [sensitive content hidden], claimed that the cancellation window was missed by 4 days, and we're now obligated to pay for their services for another year.

review_title: Great customisations & dashboards for unified data
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Flexibility in implementing various custom logics, creating & maintaining dashboards, scrapers for reports not available through APIs.
cons: Sometimes junior members of their team do not have full understanding of our business and requires us to explain everything repeatedly in detail.

review_title: A very good solution for adtech reporting
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Good data accuracy & consistency. 2. Responsive & agile team, fast turnaround times for changes/requests. 3. One of the few platforms (out of 3 others we evaluated) that offered Support for Single-Sign-On & Multi-Factor-Authentication options & a secure way for sharing & storing access.
cons: Too many configurations/features making it complex to learn/use. No on-premise options. Limited support for CDC syncs.

author: Aymeric D.
pros: Tercept is a simple and robust solution for ad driven companies that wish to centralise all of their ad reporting in one place and unify their data
cons: lack of data visualisation tools, although this is improving. users cannot build widget based dashboards like in other solutions like adomik

review_title: A very good solution for unified programmatic analytics
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tercept allows us to consolidate our programmatic reporting capabilities across multiple vendors, saving us development time so we can focus more on the real analysis. The customer support is usually helpful and responsive when issues are escalated.
cons: Sometimes there are issues e.g. one of the programmatic partner API breaks, which we'll have to highlight from the customer side. It would be great if Tercept can put in more monitoring capabilities on their side to proactively update when this happens.

review_title: A great analytics tool, especially for Google Ad Manager!
author: Chen Y.
pros: It's an easy to implement software, doesn't require nothing from our developers. The support team is amazing and every time we have issues, even on the weekends, they handle it quickly.
cons: In the past we had issues with slowness but after discussing it with the team they find a solution which fixed that.

review_title: One of the most simple and easy to use analytics tools
description: It's been great working on and growing our analytics platform together with Tercept. Client support is awesome. Looking forward for some exciting new features.
author: Vineeta S.
pros: Ease of use. The customer support is really quick and good.
cons: There could be more features like automating some mappings using the dashboard, right now its merely used for reporting and all mappings are done manually.

author: Karissa S.
pros: Their customer service is brilliant, they always solve our issue within a day. Any new request they can also disgust and build the custom cube to fit our needs in less than 1 week.
cons: The dashboard feature can be more advanced. It would be great if we can have more choices and a prettier UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience has been great so far.
author: David A.
pros: Compatible with any advertising partner that we have worked with.
cons: There are no cons to the software as of yet.

review_title: Easy to use with various Functionality
author: Brij B.
pros: Reports and Analytics are very easy and Categorized. Dashboard has all the functions that are required. Custom Implementations for new things and various functions according to my needs
cons: Few functionality is still in working process, but overall experience is good.

description: easy way to unify reports from many platforms
author: Hen D.
pros: A great way to create Customized unified reports
cons: Sometimes, the loading is very slow, RT sometimes doesn't work

author: Vivek S.
pros: Revenue optimization techniques of tercept has helped us in improving our revenue
cons: The analytics dashboard works slow which sometimes hamper productivity .

review_title: Simple & effective product for tracking revenue across SDKs
author: Abhinav P.
pros: - Ability to get a consolidated view of revenue across various demand SDKs - Ability to slice & dice the above data - Build out dashboards and views & get notified about any deviations - Great customer support
cons: - As the product is in the nascent stages, it can be made visually more appealing. But I'm not complaining as it serves it purpose

author: David B.
pros: One dashboard in one tab makes my job pretty easy than having multiple google analytic tabs to track traffic
cons: Copy pasting data is not the most efficient. Got stuck a few times but solved within a day
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Maria F.
pros: What I like the most about this software is the integration of several platforms that allows me to measure information almost in real-time
cons: not being able to granulate the information a little more
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
